title: Super Salads
description: Super Salads adds 10 unique, craftable salads with custom effects and buffs to enhance Minecraft gameplay.
body:
# Super Salads Mod 🍴🥗


Super Salads adds **10 unique, powerful salads** to your Minecraft world! Each salad has its own nutrition value, saturation, and special effects to give your gameplay a healthy (and tasty) boost.

Two new advancements are also included:

*   **First Salad** – Gain **50 XP** when crafting your first salad.
*   **All Salads** – Gain **500 XP** for crafting all 10 salads.

***


## Salad Recipes & Effects

All salads are **shapeless recipes** – ingredients can be added in any order.

### 1\. Farmer’s Salad

**Recipe:** Potato + Carrot + Beetroot  
**Nutrition:** 6 (3 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 0.8  
**Effects:** Regeneration I (8s)

### 2\. Ocean Salad

**Recipe:** Kelp + Tropical Fish + Melon Slice  
**Nutrition:** 7 (3.5 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 0.8  
**Effects:** Water Breathing (30s)

### 3\. Golden Garden Salad

**Recipe:** Golden Carrot + Beetroot + Apple  
**Nutrition:** 8 (4 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 1.0  
**Effects:** Night Vision (30s)

### 4\. Protein Power Salad

**Recipe:** Cooked Beef + Potato + Carrot  
**Nutrition:** 9 (4.5 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 1.0  
**Effects:** Strength I (20s)

### 5\. Sweet & Fruity Salad

**Recipe:** Sweet Berries + Melon Slice + Apple  
**Nutrition:** 7 (3.5 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 0.9  
**Effects:** Speed I (20s)

### 6\. Forest Salad

**Recipe:** Red Mushroom + Brown Mushroom + Beetroot  
**Nutrition:** 6 (3 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 0.7  
**Effects:** Luck (20s)

### 7\. Spicy Rabbit Salad

**Recipe:** Cooked Rabbit + Carrot + Beetroot  
**Nutrition:** 8 (4 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 0.9  
**Effects:** Jump Boost II (20s)

### 8\. Fish Salad

**Recipe:** Salmon + Cod + Tropical Fish  
**Nutrition:** 9 (4.5 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 1.0  
**Effects:** Dolphin’s Grace (15s), Speed I (15s)

### 9\. Hunter’s Salad

**Recipe:** Cooked Porkchop + Potato + Beetroot  
**Nutrition:** 9 (4.5 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 1.0  
**Effects:** Resistance I (20s)

### 10\. Royal Super Salad

**Recipe:** Golden Apple + Golden Carrot + Glistering Melon Slice  
**Nutrition:** 12 (6 drumsticks)  
**Saturation:** 1.2  
**Effects:** Absorption II (1 min), Regeneration II (10s)

***

## Advancements

*   **First Salad:** Earn **50 XP** when you craft your first salad.
*   **All Salads:** Earn **500 XP** after crafting all 10 salads.

***

## Credits

Created by matek Inspired by the love of healthy and magical Minecraft food!

_Enjoy your salads and power up your Minecraft adventures!_ 🥗✨
